docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, JAMES
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-28-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
